text.title: Wireframing Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid wireframe artefact. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "wireframe-checkout-2026-05-23", "owner": "Maria Yuskiv <maria@faion.net>", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "screens": [{ "name": "checkout-review", "variants": ["single-column stack", "two-column with sticky summary", "accordion sections"], "annotations": [{"element": "pay-now button", "behaviour": "submit order; disable on click", "conditional_states": ["loading", "disabled-if-invalid"], "tech_requirement": "POST /orders; 3-state idempotent"}], "states": {"default": "items + price summary visible", "empty": "redirect to /cart if empty", "loading": "skeleton review block", "error": "inline error above CTA", "success": "navigate to /confirmation"}, "mobile_notes": "Stack variants only at < 600px; sticky bar holds CTA." }], "open_questions": ["Should taxes appear before or after shipping in the summary?"] }

example.note: Owner plural; variants below minItems 3; annotations empty; states missing required; mobile_notes empty; no open_questions.

forbidden.pattern: Screen with `states` missing any of default / empty / loading / error / success.
